_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in communicating with all levels of management including Board members (e.g., interpersonal skills, approachability, effective listening skills, appropriate use of style and language for the audience).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating data and AI strategy, risk posture, and investment priorities to board-level and C-suite audiences using financial and business terms rather than technical language.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.542), LS-S-010 (LS, cosine: 0.533).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.489). Shared vocabulary: [board, communicating, language, skill]. DCWF-only terms [approachability, appropriate, audience, effective, interpersonal, levels] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audiences, business, c, data, financial] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.866, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 27-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in communicating with all levels of management including Board members (e." and "Skill in communicating data and AI strategy, risk posture, and investment priori" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 > STS 0.489 (gap +0.090). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [board, communicating, language, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [board, communicating, language, skill]. DCWF-only: [approachability, appropriate, audience, effective, interpersonal, levels]. WIDAI-only: [ai, audiences, business, c, data, financial].

signals.detail: STS 0.489 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
